mechanism_narrative: A falling FEDFUNDS rate transmits easier financial conditions into equity valuation expansion and lower near-term discount rates, which raises S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days when the policy rate is moving down on a 3-month basis.
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day forward SPX returns are not positive in a majority of periods with a 3-month decline in FEDFUNDS, or if the signal's rolling 2-year Rank IC stays below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS crosses above the recent inflation rate implied by CPIAUCSL and stays there, real funding costs tighten, multiples compress, and S&P 500 returns turn negative over the next month.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS rises above CPIAUCSL 12-month inflation rate and remains above it for 2 consecutive monthly observations
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations do not show below-baseline 20-day SPX returns, or if the sign flips positive in more than 40% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained rise in RSAFS indicates stronger nominal spending and revenue growth, which improves near-term earnings expectations and supports positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if positive RSAFS growth does not coincide with above-median 20-day SPX returns, or if the signal's hit rate falls below 55% in rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp increase in UNRATE signals labor-market deterioration and weaker consumer income growth, which depresses equity earnings expectations and produces negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.3 percentage points within 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if 5-day forward SPX returns are not negative after the trigger, or if the trigger-period mean return is indistinguishable from unconditional returns at p <= 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained rise in INDPRO shows stronger industrial output and cyclical manufacturing momentum, which lifts earnings revisions and supports positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO uptrends fail to predict positive 60-day SPX returns, or if the 3-year rolling Rank IC remains below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: An increase in HOUST after a prior slowdown reflects a housing-led demand rebound that improves cyclical growth expectations and pushes S&P 500 returns higher over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST rises month-over-month after at least 2 consecutive monthly declines
failure_condition: Reject if housing rebounds do not precede positive 20-day SPX returns, or if the average triggered return is not above the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: If PAYEMS is rising while UNRATE is falling, labor-market breadth is improving and household income momentum strengthens, which raises S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days through better earnings expectations.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-up/UNRATE-down condition does not outperform either series alone, or if positive 60-day returns occur in fewer than 55% of triggered periods.

mechanism_narrative: When GDP and retail sales both improve, the economy is broadening beyond one sector and equity earnings revisions should rise, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 and RSAFS both post positive growth versus their prior observation
failure_condition: Reject if simultaneous GDP and retail growth does not improve 60-day SPX returns versus either signal alone, or if the triggered hit rate remains at or below 50%.
